rationale: The cited paper is a major meta-analysis of brand advertising elasticities (short- and long-term) and empirical generalizations, which directly overlaps with the citing paper’s core constructs of advertising effectiveness and own-/cross-brand elasticity estimation. Given this strong conceptual alignment and the citing study’s positioning as extending prior advertising-effectiveness work, this is plausibly a foundational/benchmark citation rather than an obvious incidental mention, even though only a DOI-level match is available.
